ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Cash, Financing) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer involved in the transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "financing_details" TEXT /* Details of the financing, if applicable */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model production ended */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the model is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Petrol, Diesel, CNG) */,
  "is_petrol_based" INTEGER /* Whether the fuel type is based on petrol */,
  "is_diesel_based" INTEGER /* Whether the fuel type is based on diesel */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Whether the fuel type is electric */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Whether the fuel type is hybrid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)
